title: Solo Dev Suite — Project Profile
description: Canonical schema for per-project profiles shared across all Solo Dev Suite child skills.

schema_version.description: Schema version — increment when breaking changes are made and a migration is added to profile_io.py.

project_slug.description: Kebab-case identifier derived from the project name. Used for the profile filename and by child skills as a stable key. Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens only.

description.description: One-sentence summary of what the project does. Kept short on purpose — forces clarity of intent.

project_type.description: High-level project archetype. Used by child skills to tailor their output (e.g. security-audit has different checklists per type).

primary_stack.description: Core technologies in use. Each item is free-form (e.g. 'Next.js 14', 'Supabase', 'Tailwind CSS'). Order does not matter.

hosting.description: Where the production instance runs. Free-form: 'homelab (Scooby)', 'Vercel', 'Cloudflare Workers', 'AWS ECS', 'self-hosted VPS', etc.

repository_path.description: Absolute path to the code repository on the local machine, or null if the project has no code yet (still in scope/architecture phase).

target_users.description: Who uses this. Be specific — 'football pool commissioners' beats 'people who like sports'. Sharpens every downstream decision.

business_model.description: How value is captured. Used by pricing-architect and valuation-adjacent skills.

pricing_model.description: Populated by the saas-pricing-architect child skill. Null until that skill runs. Shape is owned by that skill and intentionally not enforced here.

launch_target_date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the intended launch. Null if undated. Drives the sprint-planner and launch-readiness skills.

available_hours_per_week.description: Realistic solo-dev hours per week. Be honest — overestimating here poisons every downstream plan. Used by sprint-planner for capacity math.

current_phase.description: Where the project is in the lifecycle. Used by list_skills.py to filter the child menu. Update as the project progresses.

blockers.description: Free-form notes about what's currently blocked or stuck. Children can append to this. Use verbs, not nouns ('waiting on Stripe approval' beats 'Stripe').

third_party_services.description: External dependencies. Populated and maintained by the integration-mapper child skill. Each entry captures name, purpose, and a qualitative risk rating.

risk_level.description: Qualitative impact if this service fails, changes pricing, or deprecates.

fallback.description: Optional: what the fallback plan is. Null until the dependency is analyzed.

last_skill_run.description: Map of child-skill-name → ISO 8601 timestamp of last run. The orchestrator updates this after successful child runs. Used for staleness detection.

notes.description: Freeform scratchpad. Anything that doesn't fit elsewhere. Child skills may write here but should prefer structured fields when possible.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp set by profile_io.py on init. Never modified after.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp set by profile_io.py on every successful write.
